connection_handle.c(3) Library Functions Manual connection_handle.c(3)

NAME

connection_handle.c - Shared connection ownership cleanup for TCP and WebSocket clients.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


void connection_handle_init (connection_handle_t *handle)
void connection_handle_cleanup (connection_handle_t *handle)

Detailed Description

Shared connection ownership cleanup for TCP and WebSocket clients.

Definition in file connection_handle.c.

Function Documentation

void connection_handle_cleanup (connection_handle_t * handle)

Definition at line 16 of file connection_handle.c.

16                                                             {
17   if (!handle) {
18     return;
19   }
20 
21   if (handle->transport) {
22     acip_transport_close(handle->transport);
23     acip_transport_destroy(handle->transport);
24     handle->transport = NULL;
25   }
26 
27   if (handle->owner && handle->owner_destroy) {
28     handle->owner_destroy(handle->owner);
29   }
30 
31   handle->owner = NULL;
32   handle->owner_destroy = NULL;
33   handle->transport_type = ACIP_TRANSPORT_TCP;
34 }




References acip_transport_destroy(),
    ACIP_TRANSPORT_TCP, connection_handle_t::owner,
    connection_handle_t::owner_destroy,
    connection_handle_t::transport, and
    connection_handle_t::transport_type.


Referenced by app_client_destroy(), and
    connection_context_cleanup().

  connection_handle_init (connection_handle_t * handle)

7                                                          {
8   if (!handle) {
9     return;
10   }
11 
12   *handle = (connection_handle_t){0};
13   handle->transport_type = ACIP_TRANSPORT_TCP;
14 }






References ACIP_TRANSPORT_TCP, and
